2606.04409.title: An Empirical Study of Data Scale, Model Complexity, and Input Modalities in Visual Generalization
2606.04409.paper_summary: Modern deep neural networks usually have large parameter scales and nonlinear hierarchical structures, and they have achieved strong performance in computer vision. However, the source of their generalization performance remains difficult to explain using traditional statistical learning theory. Among the factors that may affect visual generalization, data scale, model complexity, and input modalities are fundamental and controllable variables. This study empirically analyzes how these three factors influence model generalization performance. Specifically, in a preliminary experiment, we construct a one-dimensional nonlinear function and vary the number of training samples and the polynomial degree to observe the effects of data scale and model complexity on model performance. In the main experiments, we compare model performance on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 under different training data scales, model architectures, and input modalities. The experimental results show that increasing the training data scale consistently improves generalization performance, whereas changes in model complexity do not provide stable gains. In addition, removing color information degrades model performance, while explicit prior features such as gradients, edges, and wavelets have inconsistent effects across different model architectures. Overall, this study provides an empirical analysis of the relationships among data scale, model complexity, input modalities, and visual generalization performance. Code and experimental logs are available at: https://github.com/zlyd-CV/DeepLearning-Empirical-Studies.
2606.04409.paper_summary_zh: 現代深度神經網絡通常具有大型參數規模和非線性層次結構，並且在計算機視覺中表現出色。<lb/>然而，使用傳統統計學習理論來解釋它們的泛化性能來源仍然困難重重。<lb/>在可能影響視覺泛化的因素中，數據規模、模型複雜性和輸入模式是基本且可控的變量。<lb/>本研究實證分析這三個因素如何影響模型的泛化性能。<lb/>具體而言，在一個初步實驗中，我們構建了一個一維非線性函數，並變化訓練樣本的數量和多項式的階數，以觀察數據規模和模型複雜性對模型性能的影響。<lb/>在主要實驗中，我們比較了在不同訓練數據規模、模型架構和輸入模式下，模型在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的性能。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，增加訓練數據規模始終能改善泛化性能，而模型複雜性的變化則未能提供穩定的增益。<lb/>此外，去除顏色信息會降低模型性能，而顯式的先驗特徵如梯度、邊緣和小波在不同模型架構下的效果不一致。<lb/>總體而言，本研究提供了數據規模、模型複雜性、輸入模式與視覺泛化性能之間關係的實證分析。<lb/>代碼和實驗日誌可在以下鏈接獲得：https://github.com/zlyd-CV/DeepLearning-Empirical-Studies。
2606.04409.author: Luoyidi Zhou et.al.
